text:
The Smiling Titan is a student at Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

The "Smiling Titan" is very tall and, like most regular Titans, possessed a masculine body. Its main distinguishing feature was its characteristic, grinning smile, in which its lips are fixed wide open, exposing its teeth and gums within at all times.
The Smiling Titan has a thin, emaciated frame with stocky proportions, in which its ribs were visibly apparent, and it possessed an unusually-long neck. It has medium-length, blond hair that only barely reached down to its neck and featured small, gray eyes.
